target:
# Get the full list and look for "table", "game", "poker-soft" images
curl --max-time 30 --resolve "web.archive.org:443:207.241.237.3" "https://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=fulltiltpoker.com/images/com/en/content/how-to-play/new-features/*&output=json&limit=500&fl=timestamp,original&filter=statuscode:200&collapse=original" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(r[0], r[1]) for r in data[1:]]" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "table\|game\|run-it\|rush\|full-tilt-
